content: Autonomous curiosity-driven ICM agents from Topic A can be repurposed to actively curate their own long-term memory stores, addressing the key 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of filtering noisy, low-value memory to improve active learning agent efficiency. This creates a self-reinforcing loop where an agent’s intrinsic curiosity drives both what it learns and what it retains, rather than relying on human-labeled memory pruning rules.
